title.en: After another period of time, Ye Tian finally f...

content.en:
The transformation of the will into the will of the Extreme Dao means that Ye Tian's greatest shackles to comprehend the Endless Extreme Dao are gone, and with his innate understanding, he can naturally easily comprehend the Endless Extreme Dao.

In the following years, Ye Tian began to fully comprehend the Endless Extreme Dao, and constantly fused the changes in the prototype of the Endless Extreme Dao.

Gradually, there were fewer and fewer changes in the prototype of the Endless Pole.

Eight!

Seven!

Six!

Five!

......

Finally, after a long time, there were only two prototypes left of Ye Tian's Endless Extreme Dao, and once these two fused into one, it meant that Ye Tian had completely mastered the Endless Extreme Dao.

The more he reached this moment, the more nervous Ye Tian became, or rather excited.

After another period of time, Ye Tian finally fused these two changes into one.

At this time, the prototype of the Endless Pole began to metamorphose, turning into the Endless Pole.

Bang!!!!

The power of the Endless Pole Dao was born, and Ye Tian's body began to undergo the final transformation, to transform into the Endless Pole Dao.

The Endless Extreme Dao synthesizes the power of many Extreme Paths, gathers them in the Extreme Dao Body, and transforms the Extreme Dao Body into the Endless Extreme Path, which not only contains many extreme powers, but also becomes the most terrifying Extreme Path Body.

Now.

Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Body ushered in the biggest transformation, his aura became more and more terrifying, and his strength was also getting stronger and stronger.

After a long time, Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Body was finally completely transformed, becoming a true Endless Extreme Dao Body, and it was also the most suitable Extreme Dao Body for him.

At this moment, Ye Tian's foundation and potential reached the limit.

The Endless Extreme Dao Body, the Extreme Dao Will, plus all the Extreme Creation Chains in the body are all opened.

Ye Tian had already reached the limit that a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm could reach, and he could attack the perfect controller.

......

No Road Tower.

Ye Tian began to apply for a breakthrough, and the most suitable place for a breakthrough was in the body of the Daoless Tower, which was a super-grade perfect treasure, and it could extract endless energy to ensure that Ye Tian had a perfect breakthrough and had a sufficient energy supply.

When the Lord of the Ancient Realm learned that Ye Tian was going to attack the Perfect Controller, he came to find Ye Tian as soon as possible.

"Ye Tian, are you going to give up the Extreme Dao that condenses yourself?" The Lord of the Ancient Dynasty frowned and said, "You still have hope, there is no need to break through in such a hurry." Although it is difficult to collect Extreme Path Treasures, if there is an opportunity in the future, you may be able to obtain a lot of Extreme Path Treasures at once. "

"Lord of the Ancients, I have condensed the will of the Extreme Dao. "

Ye Tian said truthfully.

"What, you've condensed the will of the Extreme Dao???"

The Lord of the Ancient was shocked.

Immediately, he didn't care about spying on Ye Tian, and directly sensed Ye Tian's will.

Sure enough, Ye Tian's will had already transformed into an extreme will.

"It's true, so you have realized your own extreme path?" asked the Lord of the Ancient Beings again.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"This ......"

The Lord of the Ancient didn't know what to say, he knew very well the difficulty of condensing the will of the Extreme Dao, it was simply too difficult, and he needed too many Extreme Dao treasures.

Even he couldn't help Ye Tian collect so many Extreme Dao Treasures, because the Extreme Dao Treasures that improved his will were too rare, and even if he really found them, they would be used up soon, and very few strong people would leave a lot of Extreme Dao Treasures, so it was too difficult to collect.

But he didn't expect Ye Tian to find so many Extreme Dao treasures on his own, and raised his will to the Extreme Dao Will.

He didn't ask Ye Tian how he did it, there would inevitably be some secrets involved, and asking would undoubtedly make Ye Tian embarrassed.

Moreover, he didn't want to embarrass Ye Tian, as long as Ye Tian didn't fall in the future, he would almost 100% become the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, and he was also a perfect controller of the Extreme Realm who was stronger than him.

Therefore, he didn't want to embarrass Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian, you can rest assured to break through, break through in the Wudao Tower, no one will disturb you!" the Lord of Canggu assured.

"Well, thank you Lord of the Ancients!"

Ye Tian said.

Soon.

The news that Ye Tian was going to attack the perfect controller spread all over the circle of perfect controllers of the Daoless Tower, and many perfect controllers were shocked all of a sudden.

Although they didn't know Ye Tian's specific strength, they knew that Ye Tian had comprehended the Extreme Dao, and once he broke through to the Perfect Controller realm, his strength would inevitably be stronger than them.

No road tower, a certain branch tower.

When the Lord of Blood Separation heard the news, he couldn't help but be very emotional.

"I recruited Ye Tian into the Wudao Tower, but I didn't expect that after only so many years, Ye Tian was already about to become a perfect controller, and his strength had already surpassed me!" muttered the Lord of Blood.

His strength is not strong, and he has only just entered the middle perfect controller so far, and he is no longer comparable to Ye Tian.

If Ye Tian breaks through to the perfect controller, I'm afraid he can be pinched to death with one hand.

In fact, if he knew Ye Tian's strength, he knew that Ye Tian had not broken through yet, so he could pinch him to death with one hand.

......

"Teacher Ye Tian is about to break through!"

The Moon Glass Controller was also shocked.

She knows her own strength as a teacher, and she has comprehended too many extreme paths, and the ultimate goal must be to break through with her own extreme paths, and this is too difficult.

Moreover, Ye Tian's own extreme path is not simple, involving a large number of extreme paths, the difficulty is even greater.

But now, Ye Tian has broken through, could it be that he has already comprehended his own extreme path?

Immediately, the master of the moon glass went to meet Ye Tian and inquired.

Soon, she got an affirmative answer.

"Oh my God, Teacher Ye Tian has really comprehended his own extreme path, if this is spread out, it will be enough to shock the end of the entire realm!"

She felt that Ye Tian's future achievements were to surpass her old ancestor, the Lord of the Ancient Ages.

"I also have to work hard, under the guidance of Teacher Ye Tian, I only have dozens of changes left now, make persistent efforts, and strive to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Water as soon as possible!"

this day.

After Ye Tian was ready, he came to the Daoless Tower.

Ye Tian's breakthrough was different from other half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm, his accumulation was too deep, so Ye Tian's breakthrough could be completely compared to the breakthrough of a super perfect master, and he naturally had to run the Daoless Tower with all his might.

Rumble!!!!

The Daoless Tower connected endless time and space, extracted a large amount of Origin Energy, and poured into the Pathless Tower, forming a sea of Origin Energy, providing energy for Ye Tian's breakthrough.

Not only that, Ye Tian also prepared a lot of resources, and the Wudao Tower also provided a lot of resources, just for this breakthrough.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and began to impact the Perfect Controller realm.
